Manu is a proto indo european prophet. He is the founder of the Indo Europeans. He lived in [[Ukraine]] and was a contemporary of the [[Yellow Emperor]] in China and [[Abraham]] in [[Mesopotamia]].{{Efn|Not necessarily that close but within roughly the same millenium or so}}

He is one of the [[Three ancestors]], and the ancestor of [[Omega]]

Unlike the other three ancestors he is a mythological figure reconstructed from various mythologies.

== Proto Indo European mythological stuff ==
He is considered a prophet of [[Mithra]] and Yemo is a prophet of [[Varuna]]. Trito is a prophet of [[Omega]]-[[Perkwunos]].

The prophet of [[Alpha]] is unknown

Manu is the founder of the Proto Indo Europeans alongside [[Trito]] and his twin brother [[Yemo]].

==Footnotes==
{{Notelist}}

==References==
[[Category:Three Ancestors]]
[[Category:Nine Saints]]
[[sn:Manu]]
[[Category:Pages]]
